message:
test(core): expand crypto(+126), host(+135), telemetry(+116), manifest(+137) tests

fcp-crypto: 350→476 tests across 10 files. Ed25519 key/signature edge
cases, AEAD nonce boundaries, HKDF domain separation, MAC incremental
updates, key ID hex encoding, Shamir secret sharing GF(256), HPKE
sealed boxes, X25519 DH commutativity, canonicalization.

fcp-host: 382→517 tests across 5 files. Doctor report/self-check,
discovery cache/filter/introspection, resilience circuit/routing/health,
budget tracking/evaluation, error variants.

fcp-telemetry: 445→561 tests across 8 files. Config builder, metrics
health/timer/counter, export health response, logging depth/types,
context trace/span, tracing layer attributes, trace capture redaction
policy, usage telemetry config/recommendations.

fcp-manifest: 454→591 tests. Manifest schema version, interface hash,
protocol version, connector/zones/capabilities/provides sections,
sandbox profiles, network constraints, rate limits, events, CRDT
types, approval modes, supply chain attestation, signatures.

All clippy clean with -D warnings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
